description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

is able to be the final absorber
unsuccessful liquidation of failed Prime Agents. See [A.3.5.1 - Surplus Buffer](9782cdc5-c274-45c2-bf4a-690f22c6a294).

The Stability Capital Buffer is the surplus of the Sky Protocol that absorbs losses from unsuccessful liquidation of failed Prime Agents. See [A.3.5.1 - Surplus Buffer](9782cdc5-c274-45c2-bf4a-690f22c6a294).
description: Restructures the TMF waterfall across four steps (Security and Maintenance, Aggregate Backstop Capital growth, Smart Burn Engine with split between SKY rewards / USDS rewards / burn, and Staking Rewards). Retires the Net Revenue Ratio and activity-based staking reward tiers.
